meta.title: NurseAda – Your 24/7 Health Assistant
meta.description: AI-powered primary care support for Nigeria and Africa. Symptoms, medications, and health guidance in your language.

home.subtitle: Your 24/7 AI health assistant for Nigeria and Africa. Symptom guidance, medications, and support in English and local languages.

account.title: Account
account.patientIdHelp: Use this Patient ID when contacting support. It does not grant access to your records.

profile.title: Profile
profile.guestBody: View your Patient ID, change language, and sign out when you are done.

chat.title: Chat with NurseAda
chat.emptyState: Describe your symptoms, ask about medications, or get general health guidance. In an emergency, call 112 or seek care immediately.
chat.placeholder: Describe your symptoms or ask a health question...
chat.medicalSourceLabel: Optional: trusted health page (WHO, NHS, CDC…)
chat.medicalSourceHint: Signed-in only. We fetch public page text to improve answers—not medical advice.
chat.serverError: I couldn't reach the server. Check that the gateway is running and the URL in .env.local is correct.
chat.guestMode: Guest mode — sign in for patient data access
chat.promptDrugCombo: Can I take paracetamol with ibuprofen?
chat.promptCough: What should I do for a cough?
chat.promptDka: I have ketones and high blood sugar
chat.promptPregnancy: Is bitter leaf safe during pregnancy?
chat.attachSubtitle: Choose a source for your medical image
chat.photoPermission: Please allow access to your photos to attach medical images.
chat.cameraPermission: Please allow camera access to take photos of symptoms or scans.
chat.authBannerTitle: Save your progress and set reminders
chat.authBannerBody: Create a free account to save your chats, book appointments, and set medication reminders.

remedies.title: Herbal Remedies
remedies.subtitle: Evidence-based complementary options for common conditions
remedies.noResults: No remedies match your search. Try a different term or condition.
remedies.disclaimer: These are complementary options and should not replace conventional medical treatment. Always tell your healthcare provider about any herbal remedies you use, especially if you take medications. In an emergency, seek care immediately.

medications.title: Medications
medications.subtitle: Manage reminders and check drug interactions
medications.signInReminders: Sign in to create and manage medication reminders.
medications.noRemindersHint: Add one to stay on track with your medications.
medications.interactionLabel: Enter medications to check for interactions
medications.noInteractions: No known interactions found between these medications.
medications.minTwoDrugs: Enter at least two medications to check for interactions.
medications.disclaimer: This is general information only, not medical advice. Always confirm medication details and interactions with your pharmacist or doctor. Consult a healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment. In an emergency, seek care immediately.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.subtitle: Find clinics and manage your appointments
appointments.signInAppointments: Sign in to view and manage your appointments.
appointments.noAppointmentsHint: Find a clinic and book your first appointment.
appointments.noClinics: No clinics found matching your filters.
appointments.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe your reason for the appointment
appointments.signInBook: Sign in to book an appointment.
appointments.disclaimer: Appointment requests are for scheduling purposes only and do not constitute a medical consultation. Please confirm availability directly with the facility. This is general information only, not medical advice. Consult a healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment. In an emergency, seek care immediately or call 112.
appointments.adminSignInRequired: Please sign in to manage clinics.
appointments.adminClinicsSubtitle: Manage the NurseAda primary care network. Only admins can see this page.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your NurseAda health assistant
auth.signUpSubtitle: Sign up to save your conversations and access patient records
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to <bold>{email}</bold>. Click the link to activate your account, then sign in.
auth.signUpDisclaimer: By creating an account you agree that NurseAda provides general health information only, not medical advice. Always consult a healthcare provider.

patient.title: Patient Profile
patient.notFoundBody: That Patient ID doesn't match your account. Please open your own profile from Account.
patient.noObservations: No observations found for this patient.
patient.noMedications: No medications found for this patient.
patient.noReports: No reports found for this patient.
